positive: A highly detailed, intricate graphic illustration of a mystical zodiac constellation forming a crescent moon, cradling various glowing celestial flora, including star-petaled blooms, ethereal ferns, and glowing roots. The style must be neo-tattoo flash and botanical illustration, featuring strong, clean black linework contrasted with deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, deep violet) and rich gold metallic accents. The composition must be centralized, symmetrical, and feature bold, recognizable silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. The artwork should look like a single, cohesive magical emblem. Highly intricate line work, maximalist composition, clean background.
